Development Program on "Introductory Course in Artificial Intelligence & Its Application," organised from November 24th to 29th, 2025, at Chandigarh Group of Colleges (CGC), Landran, Mohali and funded by E&ICT, CDAC Mohali. Dr. Nishant Jain 07 July 2025 1 Delivered an Expert Lecture in 5- Days FDP on “Emerging Technologies for Educators: AI, IoT & AR/VR” on the topic titled “From Signals to Sequences: Applications of Signal Processing in Genomics” supported by MeitY, Govt. of India, and conducted by Electronics & ICT Academy, C-DAC Mohali in collaboration with Indo Global Group of Colleges, New Chandigarh from 7th July 2025 to 11th July 2025. Dr. Pardeep Garg 05 July 2025 1 Delivered an expert lecture in the Two-Day national-level workshop on "Controller Design Strategies for Futuristic Applications" organised from July 4th to 5th, 2025, at G H Raisoni College of Engineering and Management, Pune. On July 5th, I delivered a lecture on “AI Driven Robotics in Biomedical Healthcare”. Dr. Nishant Jain 25 June 2025 1 Delivered an expert lecture in the Faculty Development Program on "Introductory Course in Artificial Intelligence & Its Application," organised from June 23rd to 27th, 2025, at C-DAC Mohali. On June 25th, I delivered two lectures on “Data Visualization and Statistical Modeling” and on “Supervised Learning: Regression & Classification Techniques”. Dr. Nishant Jain 26th Feb 2025 1 Delivered an expert lecture in the FDP on "AI-Based Image Processing for Bio-Medical Applications (AIIPBM-2025)", organized from February 17th to 28th, 2025 by Electronics and ICT Academy, NIT Patna and NIT Jamshedpur, under the MeitY Government of India. I delivered a lecture on "Medical Imaging for Early Tumour Detection". Dr. Nishant Jain 17th Jan 2025 & 21st Jan 2025 2 Delivered a expert lecture on "AI in Biomedical Applications" on 17th January 2025 and a hands-on session on "Designing CNN Models using Python" on 21st January 2025 in the Faculty Development Program on "Exploring AI and its Applications" organised by E&ICT Academy, Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (#CDAC), Mohali in collaboration with University Institute of Technology (UIT), HPU, Shimla.
